,sx:{"&:hover":{backgroundColor:"#f0f0f0"},borderBottom:"1px solid #ddd"},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ListItemText,{primary:company.company_name})},company.id)):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{sx:{textAlign:"center",padding:2},children:"No companies found."})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Fab,{color:"primary","aria-label":"add",sx:{position:"fixed",bottom:20,right:20,backgroundColor:"#1976d2","&:hover":{backgroundColor:"#1565c0"}},onClick:()=>navigate("/Com_register"),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AddIcon,{})})]});}export default Company;
